what: Set the active vault in the navigation store so the UI switches to master-detail layout
why: Updates global navigation context: VaultsPage reacts by replacing the vault grid with a left vault list + right VaultKnowledgeTree panel; ContextualSidebar switches to vault mode showing Knowledge and Linked Projects links

success_handling.criteria: Selected vault is stored as the active vault and knowledge tree begins loading

decisions.reason: selectVault clears activeProject; no route navigation occurs
decisions.rationale: Vault context activates the ContextualSidebar (Knowledge link only, no Sessions). No separate navigation needed.

decisions.reason: VaultsPage uses Show when={activeVault()} to switch layouts reactively
decisions.rationale: Setting activeVault() signal triggers Show when={activeVault()} in VaultsPage, replacing the full-width grid with a master-detail layout: w-96 vault list on the left, VaultKnowledgeTree filling the right column.
